semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the Spine Gate infrastructure module, verifying protected output mutation detection and baseline writing integrity.
responsibilities: Test the writeProtectedOutputBaseline function to ensure it correctly writes baseline files for the first time.
Test the detectProtectedOutputMutations function to verify it detects newly added paths after baseline is written.
Ensure proper cleanup of temporary test directories between tests.
Validate that formatProtectedOutputMutationWarning (not directly tested in snippet) is callable by integration.
Exercise the spine-gate module's public contract: baseline creation and mutation detection.
outOfScope: No production symbols are exported; the file serves no runtime module contract.
Does not test edge cases like concurrent file writes or permission errors.
Does not provide any CLI commands, HTTP handlers, or MCP tools.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts to satisfy the naming convention rule.
Temporary test directory must be created and cleaned up for isolation.
All imports from vitest must be used appropriately.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a comprehensive test suite for the spine-gate module to prevent regressions in protected output handling.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent provided beyond the generic commit message.
